creation of models.", "contributors": [ { "name": "Mareike Schomerus", "level": "Sole", "aiTool": "Claude Sonnet 4.6 and Opus 4.7", "reason": "To get feedback on ideas and feasibility", "extent": 1, "extentLabel": "Some AI use" } ], "aiTool": null, "reason": null, "extent": 1, "extentLabel": "Some AI use" }, { "id": "project_admin", "label": "Project Administration", "definition": "Management and coordination responsibility for the research activity planning and execution.", "contributors": [], "aiTool": null, "reason": null, "extent": 0, "extentLabel": "No AI use" }, { "id": "resources", "label": "Resources", "definition": "Provision of study materials, reagents, materials, patients, laboratory samples, animals, instrumentation, computing resources, or other analysis tools.", "contributors": [], "aiTool": null, "reason": null, "extent": 0, "extentLabel": "No AI use" }, { "id": "software", "label": "Software", "definition": "Programming, software development; designing computer programs; implementation of the computer code and supporting algorithms; testing of existing code components.", "contributors": [ { "name": "Mareike Schomerus", "level": "Sole", "aiTool": "Claude Sonnet 4.6 and Opus 4.7", "reason": "For all vibe coding; a more detailed description is in Saleh, Engy, and Mareike Schomerus. 2026. The sIfA tool for a Statement of Intellectual Fellowship and Accountability: An invitation to reflect on how humans and AI interact in producing knowledge (Groundwork 32 Thought Piece). Nairobi: Busara. doi: 10.62372/IUPB2137", "extent": 2, "extentLabel": "Extensive AI use" } ], "aiTool": null, "reason": null, "extent": 2, "extentLabel": "Extensive AI use" }, { "id": "supervision", "label": "Supervision", "definition": "Oversight and leadership responsibility for the research activity planning and execution, including mentorship external to the core team.", "contributors": [], "aiTool": null, "reason": null, "extent": 0, "extentLabel": "No AI use" }, { "id": "validation", "label": "Validation", "definition": "Verification of the overall replication/reproducibility of results/experiments and other research outputs.", "contributors": [ { "name": "Mareike Schomerus", "level": "Sole", "aiTool": "Claude Sonnet 4.6 and Opus 4.7", "reason": null, "extent": 0, "extentLabel": "No AI use" } ], "aiTool": null, "reason": null, "extent": 0, "extentLabel": "No AI use" }, { "id": "visualization", "label": "Visualization", "definition": "Preparation, creation and/or presentation of the published work, specifically visualization/data presentation.", "contributors": [ { "name": "Mareike Schomerus", "level": "Sole", "aiTool": null, "reason": "To turn all visual ideas into actual visuals", "extent": 2, "extentLabel": "Extensive AI use" } ], "aiTool": null, "reason": null, "extent": 2, "extentLabel": "Extensive AI use" }, { "id": "writing_original", "label": "Writing – original draft", "definition": "Preparation, creation and/or presentation of the published work, specifically writing the initial draft (including substantive translation).", "contributors": [ { "name": "Mareike Schomerus", "level": "Sole", "aiTool": "Claude Opus 4.7", "reason": "All software documentation was drafted by AI. AI also worded the author questions.
